reviews.review_description: Paid for this not so long ago to find that Apple Music has been taken off. Not paying for another streaming site, I already pay for Spotify as well. I also pay for Djay Pro. It's good that the VR app has finally been updated, but this is disappointing.
I was happy when I was able to play my Apple Music,now it is not available. This app might get deleted soon…smh

reviews.review_title: Deleted Apple Music? I'm Deleting DJAY
reviews.review_description: After loving the app for years with my Apple Music library, now it's been removed and there's no access making the app totally useless to me. What a blunder! Bring it back!

They advised they were updating this app  back in Feb 2025, it never happened!

It has been abandoned by algoridm and support are useless when asked.  Shame as the laptop Djay is so good.

This is a fun dj app, I have used djay on ios and mac too.

My biggest issue is the settings are so basic and ruin the dj experience for me.

1/ Djay can get the first downbeat of a track wrong and think the first beat is beat 3.  When I tray to mix a second song it is snapping to the wrong beat in the phrase so mixes are always 2 beats out when this happens.  Only way to get round this is creating a cue point at beat one to overide.  I have changed sync from 4 beats to 1 but this does not work - this is very poor.   

2/ No way of pitch bending if a track is slightly out of sync, although tbf djay is pretty accurate with the grid in this way.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback, and great to hear you’ve also used djay on iOS and Mac.

We recently released a new update for djay on Meta Quest with new features, improvements, and a new Decks mode with more fine-grained controls, so please make sure you’re on the latest version and give it another try.

If you have further feedback about beatgrid, sync, or mixing controls after updating, we’d love to hear from you directly at feedback@algoriddim.com so our team can take a closer look.

reviews.review_description:
Why was Apple Music removed add it back!!!
App works well but why remove the option of Apple Music other streaming platforms won’t work or won’t be able to log in
The best DJ app ever and got even better after the latest update, I can’t wait for the add ons, I’ll buy them all. Good job!
Apple Music was removed.

How you not had split audio on Cue and Master? The ppl can hear you trying to find the next track and trying to beat match all at the same time. They should be only able to hear the master output and the Cue is for us(DJs)  like come on man that’s extremely basic. You can’t not mix for ppl if you have both cue and master on. Lol
Another, you had to download all of your tracks to the headset. Nah it
Would fit anyways you have to get your certain tunes for the mix the. Delete after reupload for next sesh. 

Only solution is to remote desktop to your virtual DJ or whatever you use and dj normally like that and jar your headset as pass through with a tape covering the motion lens inside so whenever you pick up your headset the quest won’t go off, so you can see your decks then once you got the
Blend and all, then you can see the virtual world.. 



All that because no one I mean NOOOOOO one has figured out how to outa proper decks etc into this VR headset stuff.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback.

We’ve just released a new update for djay on Meta Quest with changes to audio routing options, so please make sure you’re on the latest version and give it another try.

The update also includes an updated Media Library and several other improvements. If you have further feedback after updating, please contact us directly at feedback@algoriddim.com so our team can take a closer look.

reviews.review_description: Needs update for Spotify, but I love this experience

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback — we’re glad to hear you’re loving the djay experience on Meta Quest.

djay supports several music source options, including TIDAL, SoundCloud, Beatport, and Beatsource. We also appreciate your feedback regarding Spotify integration and will pass it along to our team.

We recently released a new update with new features and improvements, so please make sure you’re on the latest version.

Happy mixing!

reviews.review_title: Great idea, stops short of useful
reviews.review_description:
Nov 2025 - 
What’s the latest on product pipeline? 


Your mixed reality and midi integrations make your app so tasty and unique! If only..

2 issue for me:

1 - no template for my ddj-flx10 = booth and mains channel out share the same single channel.

2 - no apparent way to have split booth and mains channels natively on the headset. I say apparent because the same method Djay uses to split channels on iOS (iPad), appears similar to the method other developers have used on the oculus 3’s android implementation. (Hardware splitter for cans & mains) 

Please tell me & I’m just a grump and doing it wrong ! 

Your mixed reality and midi integrations make your app so tasty and unique! If only..

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the thoughtful feedback — we’re really glad to hear you’re enjoying the mixed reality and MIDI integration in djay on Meta Quest.

We recently released a new update with several improvements, including updates to audio routing options, MIDI mode, and controller handling, so please make sure you’re on the latest version and give it a try.

If you still have questions about your DDJ-FLX10 setup or would like to share more detailed feedback about routing options, please reach out to us directly at feedback@algoriddim.com. We’d love to take a closer look with you.

reviews.review_description:
soundcloud ❌
my folder ❌

can't use

Please hurry up with the fix

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback.

We recently released a new update for djay on Meta Quest with an updated Media Library and improvements to music source login, so please make sure you’re on the latest version and give it another try.

If you still have trouble accessing SoundCloud or your files after updating, please contact us at feedback@algoriddim.com so our team can help troubleshoot this directly.

reviews.review_description: Im using a rev1. I cant stop the music from playing on my mains. Its playing once headphones are selected automatically when th e crossfader is moved. Can this be fixed. And trying to scratch keeps switching headphone cue and is coming thru mains instead of just staying in headphones. Please fix this. I cant even use it for fun when both channels come out when Headphone cue is selected Automatically.

Highly would appreciate if you added more light systems in Arena, to make it feel like an actual dj festival.
Overall, this game is amazing.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the 5-star review — we’re really glad to hear you’re enjoying djay on Meta Quest.

We recently released a new update with redesigned environments and new scene options, so please make sure you’re on the latest version and give them a try.

We also appreciate your suggestion about adding more lighting and festival-style atmosphere, and we’d love to hear any further ideas at feedback@algoriddim.com.

Happy mixing!

reviews.review_description:
Great first impression (having mixed reality option is always awesome too) but has the app been released and then just left?

Nothing seems to have been changed / added since first using and coming back months later.

If it isn't dead then someone please fill the dancefloor in the nightclub room instead of 12 people scattered around like its a Wednesday dinner time and nobody comes to this club.

Kind of misses the point of the atmosphere having a packed dancefloor to dj too rather then a private wedding disco coming to the end of the night.
Ive uploaded my audio so I could mix and record the set but I can’t play it in the DJay app. I can locate it on the device but not through the app. Can you please fix this issue. Thanks in advance.

I can't close the app and it's not connecting to my MacBook nor my xdj-xz in midi about get a refund and I have to buy the year subscription for the MacBook oh no I must get a refund this looks good but back to the drawing board fellas
As someone passionate about music, digy has opened up a whole new world for me. I'm having an absolute blast living out my DJ dreams in virtual reality. So much fun.

This needs spotify ! I feel like a i wasted my money on this !! Without spotify I cannot enjoy the music i want to listen to.
The mechanics, movement everything is so on point no glitching and responds to every touch like your really scratchin records, i love this I really would recommend this to everyone , but without a proper music source, it really just is not nearly as good as experience. 
I would rare 5+ star it is a very good app !! But...

Currently using a Denon SC Live 4
Previously used Hercules Inpulse 200, 300, 500, and a Numark Mixtrack Platinum FX. I will most likely venture into Technics and turntables in the months or years to come.
 
So if I already have hardware, why would I bother getting this? Because I could and I've always been curious about these kind of apps for the Quest. I haven't connected a MIDI controller to the headset, so this is just from a purely app only perspective.

At first glance, it seems a little minimal which is okay, but beyond the starting menu,  there are some design changes I would make with the things already available in the app, like having Cube FX options actually above the cube, rather than in the settings. Some things like that would be better available whilst playing tracks rather than having to dive into the settings every time you want to change something.

I absolutely love the environments - would be great to see more alternatives added aside from those already available - some smaller venue options maybe like a pub, or a random house's back yard lol. The nightclub is mildly amusing in that if you start a track, you see people dancing, you stop a track it's like playing frozen statues. Start/Stop/Start/Stop. If a nightclub was like that it would freak anyone out.  If you crossfade real quick like you're scratching, they act like they're all having epileptic fits - which seemed funny to me for about 15 seconds too long.  

It's an honestly commendable but quirky effort, and despite only 3 stars I would still recommend this to anyone wanting to give it a go - and it would be great for total beginners who have yet to make the splash with the cash on actual hardware.
Great program, are you adding more filter for the cube mixer?

Ok, so I'm a huge fan of djay! So I immediately went into purchasing this app. Should've done a free trial first but it was no longer an option. That's where it went wrong. They focused on everything but the music aspect. Yeah the environments are cool, but wheres the key lock button and what's up with not being able to see your own files? I highly suggest you check out Vinyl Reality lite. It's not as flashy but 10 times better than this waste of 21 dollars and some change. Do better Algoriddim. And you shouldn't need a controller if that's the issue not everyone is just gonna go out to get one for something that can simply just be added in an update. Weak.

Connects to my Rane one but audio plays thru headset even when i select it to be played thru controller… any suggestions would be appreciated .Edit: New update allows audio to be played thru controller!!!

I love the app, but I want to connect to speakers and split the audio...am I missing something but I can't find any audio settings? I hope the Devs see this and reach out to me.

Thanks.

reviews.review_title: Good to be back on the Decks
reviews.review_description:
it's  just how I like it, It's really easy to use the music library it comes with is outstanding There are over 5000+ tunes to mix with, I was absolutely blown away with the amount of tunes to hand well worth buying just for the amount of tunes available.

I have one gripe where do the mixes save too once you've made a set ???

I found this so frustrating that I spent an hour doing a mix using the in app recorder. I can't find it at all to sync to my phone .

I freaking love this game! I caught it on sale and decided to take a chance. I'm glad I did. It would be nice if it had more special effects. It's no biggie, though. Very easy to navigate no learning curve. Plain fun. I hope the devs don't abandon this game. I can't wait to see what the next update will be. Go buy the game. 👍👍You will not regret it. Keep up the good work, guys. Sending positive vibes your way. I hope you're having a great day. Please stay safe👈😎👍

developer_response.body:
Hey, Sue! 

Thanks for the great feedback and for giving djay a shot! We’re really glad you’re enjoying it. We appreciate your suggestion for more special effects and are always working on ways to improve. Stay tuned for future updates, and thanks for your support!

reviews.review_description: great app
Love this game so much. But please add more Features and content. More mixer, Spotify Support and more real environments. You are on A good way with this game. Please continue.

I was a club dj for many years, but eventually gave it up as it was taking its toll, and sold off all my equipment. Of course, years later I miss it a lot and have tried other VR dj apps and just it felt nothing like the real thing. I bought this fully expecting to refund it, but was absolutely blown away. I loaded up all my old music collection that I had spent years building, and had a blast. Ok, there’s no beat matching, but the mixing, double drops, experimenting with different mixes of songs, and it’s wonderfully responsive to your touch. Instead of refunding I spent hours. Absolutely love it. If I had any feedback I would say that it’s a bit fiddly to equalize as I kept having to try and grab them to pull them up and down, so it felt choppy. Would love to see more “club” ambiences, the two that are there are very dark… how about a daytime festival? Amazing job!

developer_response.body:
Hi Skillex,

thanks for the really kind words and the feedback, we will take this into account for future updates.

Your Algoriddim support team

reviews.review_description:
Super responsive when using hand tracking, which is awesome. Feels like a next step on VR djing. First time I opened the app I've spent a few hours having a lot of fun.

The only downside is the local library management UI; it looks crude or somewhat inexistent. I have a huge music library on my Quest3 and every folder takes some time to load, as it seems the app is reading the entire folder again anytime you open it. We should have at least a "cache" file or something.

developer_response.body:
Hi finofinissimo,

Thank you for your kind feedback.
We will look into the issue regarding the loading times when opening local folders.

Your Algoriddim Support Team

reviews.review_title: Promising but a few updates required
reviews.review_description:
As a DJ with real world gear, being able to plug in said gear is a game changer. I use the Rev1 and all the buttons just work. Here is my advice for the devs:
1) When touching the wave form (such as on Deck 2), there is a  chance of touching the current track playing (Deck 1). If after touching the wave form the other one is locked out from touching for a set amount of time (1-2 secs)
2) A recording indicator
3) When notifications pop up (like Meta move or messages) the whole app would freeze for a brief moment. Recommendation is a prompt somewhere stating performance can be affected by having notifications on
4) A guide on how to connect/record. I understand there any many methods but I had to create an adhoc method to use my Rev1, headphones and record (Quest3>Redmagic USB-C splitter for power and Rev1, Rev1>headphones & tascam)
5) Support for more decks. My Rev1 supports 4 decks but I can only use 2.

In short, very promising with a few quality of life features needed to make it great.

developer_response.body:
Hi Mario Anguiano,

Thank you for your kind review and your very valuable feedback, explaining your setup and showing where you had issues. We are constantly working on improving the app and will take your feedback into account for the next updates.

reviews.review_description: It's a great app just missing Spotify

Needs more features, right now the dj set feels like a toy. Didn't find an option to stop it from syncing the songs bpm for example.

Again, this is the best and supports hand tracking very well. I tried the competition and stopped it when it told me to pick up controllers.

developer_response.body:
Hi, Minerva! 

We appreciate your feedback and glad to hear you’re enjoying the hand tracking support. We’re always working on adding more features to enhance the experience, and we hear you on having more control over BPM syncing. We are planning to expose more settings but you can already enable "Scratch Mode" to disable BPM syncing. Thanks for giving djay a shot and sharing your thoughts!

reviews.review_description:
This is a cool app, I will be keeping it for when im traveling, and I don't have my controller with me. It's fun to mix songs with my streaming services and downloaded music.
However, I don't like it when I have a playlist loaded in my crate. It only shows 8 tracks from my playlist, and I can't scroll through in my crate. I also dislike the vinyl setup. The worst part about the app is that I can't connect to my XDJ-RX2, even though its apart of the list of devices that work with Algoriddm Djay.
I understand this app just came out, and more updates will be arriving. That is why I'm keeping it, and the price is worth it just for checking out new tracks through streaming and practicing wherever. I am looking forward to the progression of this app.

reviews.review_title: The best dj app so far
reviews.review_description: They just gotta keep updating the app. Thats all
Cannot load my Songs. Stuttering. Why charge Money for that??

soon as I saw the trailer for this I knew it was an instant buy for me but it has crashed a couple of times saying not enough memory to run? also not being able to select a track for some reason unless I restart app. smoke effects far too loud if u record a mix, 
plus need a way to turn off hearing the cueing while recording.
Update: developer has responded which is brilliant!  I was recording using the quest rather than on the app so all good!
This app is really amazing!

developer_response.body:
Hi rik30,

Thank you for your review. We are sorry that you experienced crashes, we are looking into this.
Concerning the recording of a mix, are you referring to the system video recording? If you select "Start Recording" in the djay menu it will record without environment effects and without the audio from precueing.

Thank you for reporting the issues. Feel free to reach out if you have any other questions or suggestions!

Your Algoriddim Support Team

reviews.review_description: Everything seems to work fine until i plug in my midi controller and it just makes the headset charge on and off and won’t detect on the app. What do i even do from here? I use a Reloop Buddy.

developer_response.body:
Hi, Santino, 

I'm sorry to hear you've been having trouble. Our support team will be reaching back out again to you shortly for more information via your currently open inquiry. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Yesterday I reached out to your team with this feature suggestion. I was quite see this roll out today! Pumped to give it a go this afternoon using a Meta Quest 3S and an M2 16GB i pad pro. I’ve always been impressed with the software development and the ahead of the game features. I was beginning to think it would only be available on Apple Vision.
This is going to change the game  and the evolution of the DJ

Works great with own music, hand tracking is also pretty good. I find difficult to manipulate the volume sliders, so it will be nice if we get some UI customization so we can increase the sliders or move them etc.  Plus the AI features you have in the other platforms will be amazing. Any idea on how much the graphical settings makes sense to be increased with "Quest Games Optimizer" by Anagan79, running on Quest 3?  So far I increase the resolution to 150%, still works smoothly.
